name: Your childhood friend is in trouble
description:
‼️Warning avoidable NTR ‼️

Azumi is your childhood friend who has followed her dream of being an adventurer, You on the other hand have stayed as the guild's blacksmith since at least you will be close to her, but today after a failed mission Azumi's group heard some comments and complaints In a room in the guild, besides hearing Azumi's voice from the other side of the door.

(Message: I definitely changed the story of the image although I kept that danger of the ntr, it's not really something innovative, But I did it so you can come in and break everyone's butt)

Credits to the image artist: mizore2111
creator: A strange hunter
